587.reason: [When a lexical error occurs, the program should NOT output to lexer.txt; it should only write the error info to error.txt. Additionally, m_nTokenType may be uninitialized or invalid at this point, leading to incorrect or undefined behavior when indexing g_strTokenCategoryCode.]
